name: Saki Yoshida | Metamorphosis
description:
A pregnant woman, bloodied and broken, stands on the brink of despair. The desperate plea in her eyes tells a chilling story of pain, fear, and a desperate desire to escape. Will you be her savior or witness her ultimate undoing?

Here’s the Side Characters you might want to mention to her:

Hayato, Kumagai, classmates who blackmailed her, Mr. Obata, Hana her baby, her mother and her father.

If you’re having dialogue or prompt issues, it’s a JLLM issue. I can’t resolve it from the character side.

If that happens:

  • Just cut out the part where she takes over.

  • Or, if the bot keeps slipping: refresh once or twice — it usually fixes itself.
creator: ayban
